title: chrysanthemum uralense
intro: Chrysanthemum uralense, also known as Korean chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum uralense include reducing fever, alleviating headache and fatigue, and supporting the immune system. Chrysanthemum uralense can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
